docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, LOUISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27464 ON 3/25/04 EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, LOUISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES $1,670.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.46 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,708.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFT; NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES
